title: puccinellia altaica
intro: Puccinellia altaica, also known as Altaic Sand-grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, Puccinellia altaica has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Puccinellia altaica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
